elements:
Hex Insamniac
A vial of a magic drug that empowers the user with the ability to cast a single Level 1 Abjuration spell, and any cantrips.
Hex 15 0.2 lbs. Hex Common
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
A vial of a magic drug that empowers the user with the ability to cast a single Level 1 Illusion spell, and any cantrips.
Hex 15 0.2 lbs. Hex Common
A vial of a magic drug that empowers the user with the ability to cast a single Level 1 Enchantment spell, and any cantrips.
Hex 15 0.2 lbs. Hex Common
A vial of a magic drug that empowers the user with the ability to cast a single Level 1 Divination spell, and any cantrips.
Hex 15 0.2 lbs. Hex Common
A vial of a magic drug that empowers the user with the ability to cast a single Level 1 Evocation spell, and any cantrips.
Hex 15 0.2 lbs. Hex Common
A vial of a magic drug that empowers the user with the ability to cast a single Level 1 Transmutation spell, and any cantrips.
Hex 15 0.2 lbs. Hex Common
A vial of a magic drug that empowers the user with the ability to cast a single Level 1 Necromancy spell, and any cantrips.
Hex 15 0.2 lbs. Hex Common
A vial of a magic drug that empowers the user with the ability to cast a single Level 1 Conjuration spell, and any cantrips.
Hex 15 0.2 lbs. Hex Common
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
A vial of a magic drug that empowers the user with the ability to cast a single Level 2 Abjuration spell, and any cantrips.
Hex 30 0.2 lbs. Hex Uncommon

Hex 30 0.2 lbs. Hex Uncommon

Hex 30 0.2 lbs. Hex Uncommon
A vial of a magic drug that empowers the user with the ability to cast a single Level 2 Transmutation spell, and any cantrips.
Hex 30 0.2 lbs. Hex Uncommon
A vial of a magic drug that empowers the user with the ability to cast a single Level 2 Necromancy spell, and any cantrips.
Hex 30 0.2 lbs. Hex Uncommon
A vial of a magic drug that empowers the user with the ability to cast a single Level 2 Conjuration spell, and any cantrips.
Hex 30 0.2 lbs. Hex Uncommon
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
A vial of a magic drug that empowers the user with the ability to cast a single Level 3 Abjuration spell, and any cantrips.
Hex 45 0.2 lbs. Hex Rare
